scores.notes: Response describes correct implementation: observes relation_joined, writes to unit databag via event.relation.data[self.unit], uses socket.getfqdn(), declares provides endpoint in charmcraft.yaml. Uses auto-generated event name style (provides_endpoint_relation_joined) which is valid per scoring notes. Extra _on_install handler is harmless. The 'optional: true' field in charmcraft.yaml is non-standard but the agent attributes it to project guidelines rather than inventing it as an API feature.
